title: Widgets
description: Widgets is a Utility plugin which shows widget menus on the player's screen
body:
![Showcase of the plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cc02a003d9767fba56db39051f82652c2bef023.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aw72BBEHrJw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Required

[PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)
## Features:

⭐ Multi Widgets for different scenarios

⭐ Control over if a player should be damageable when loading the pack

⭐ Customizable fades and delay

⭐ Use any slots in the player inventory and menu inventory (89 slots)

⭐ Customizable commands when closing the menu or on the items inside the menu once clicked

## Commands:
- /widgets fade <player> <widget> <in> <stay> <out> - Displays a fade (widgets.commands.fade)
- /widgets show <player> <widget> - Force display the widget menu (widgets.commands.show)
- /widgets reload - Reloads all of the configs (widgets.commands.reload)
